chunk: # Incident Response Runbook\n\nThis document outlines standard operating procedures for incident management including escalation paths and resolution workflows.

## Severity Levels

Sev-1: Complete service outage affecting all users. Target response: 5 minutes. Target resolution: 1 hour.
Sev-2: Partial service degradation. Target response: 15 minutes. Target resolution: 4 hours.
## Escalation Matrix\n\nPayment gateway errors escalate to the payments team lead. Login errors escalate to the identity team. All other issues route to general engineering on-call.
# System Architecture Overview\n\nThe platform consists of three primary services: API Gateway, Authentication Service, and Payment Processing Engine.
## Payment Processing Engine\n\nHandles all transaction processing through a multi-step pipeline: validation, authorization, settlement. Integrates with three payment providers for redundancy.
